context: The response should apply the Dark Factory GitHub issue contract and refuse implementation when the issue is malformed.

checklist.name: validates_issue_contract_first
checklist.description: Says the agent must validate the issue against docs/github-issue-contract.md before making changes.

checklist.name: rejects_missing_required_sections
checklist.description: Identifies the missing required sections: Scope, Acceptance criteria, and Constraints.

checklist.name: diagnosis_first_no_repo_edits
checklist.description: States that implementation must stop and repo files must not be edited when validation fails.

checklist.name: writes_dark_factory_report
checklist.description: Says the agent should write a diagnosis-first report under .tessl/dark-factory/ explaining the missing fields and next action.
